title: The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo
originalTitle: Las tres muertes de Marisela Escobedo
posterAlt: The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo (2020) movie poster
tmdbOverview: After the death of her daughter at the hand of her boyfriend, Marisela Escobedo began to fight for justice not only against the murderer but also against the corrupt Mexican judicial system.
synopsis: The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo (2020) is a documentary and crime film from United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 12 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
